items.headline: Dollander exits in 2nd inning with right arm tightness
items.summary: Sleepless Gordon saves 'pen with 4 strong frames

news_items.headline: Rangers' Seager to miss 2nd straight vs. Astros
news_items.summary: Rangers All-Star shortstop Corey Seager was not in the starting lineup Saturday against the Astros after waking up with back spasms.

news_items.headline: Cards endorse shirtless fan trend after walk-off
news_items.summary: A new trend seems to have caught on at Busch Stadium after dozens of shirtless Cardinals fans, led by a college baseball team out of Alton, Illinois, sparked back-to-back wins this weekend.

news_items.headline: Mets say Holmes could return to pitch this year
news_items.summary: Mets pitcher Clay Holmes' broken leg should heal in time for him to pitch again for the team during the final two months of this season.

news_items.headline: Phillies' Wathan makes history as fill-in manager
news_items.summary: Dusty Wathan filled in as manager for Philadelphia's 6-0 win over Pittsburgh on Saturday while Don Mattingly attended his son Trevor's graduation from Purdue University.

news_items.headline: Red Sox put Story (hernia) on IL, promote Sogard
news_items.summary: The Red Sox have placed struggling shortstop Trevor Story on the 10-day injured list with a sports hernia.

news_items.headline: Blue Jays' Berrios set to undergo elbow surgery
news_items.summary: Blue Jays right-hander Jose Berrios will undergo surgery on his pitching elbow Wednesday. A recovery timeline won't be known until after the procedure.

news_items.headline: Yanks' Fried headed to 15-day IL with bone bruise
news_items.summary: The New York Yankees will place pitcher Max Fried on the 15-day injured list because of a left elbow bruise, the team announced Friday.

news_items.headline: Dodgers' Snell scratched from scheduled start
news_items.summary: Dodgers left-hander Blake Snell was a late scratch from his second start of the season Friday at Angel Stadium because of loose bodies in his left elbow, which will sideline him indefinitely.

news_items.headline: Where to watch San Francisco Giants vs. Athletics: Live stream, TV channel, odds for Saturday, May 16
